Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Freetech Road Recycling Technology (Holdings) Limited.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Freetech (英达热再生有限公司) is a highly specialized, foreign-owned (Hong Kong/Macao/Taiwan) medium-to-large enterprise dominating a niche sector: asphalt pavement 'Hot-in-Place Recycling' technology. Established in 2000 in the Nanjing Economic and Technological Development Zone, it boasts a massive paid-in capital of 58.62 Million USD and maintains 114 insured employees. The official industry classification ('Diving Rescue & Unspecified Transport Equipment') is a severe miscategorization. Its true core competency, clearly outlined in its business scope and confirmed by its domain ('freetech.com.hk'), is the manufacturing of specialized road maintenance vehicles/machinery and the direct contracting of highway paving and municipal road maintenance projects. It operates a highly integrated 'Equipment Manufacturing + Engineering Contracting' business model.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 76)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / NICHE INDUSTRY LEADER (ROAD MAINTENANCE)
